articles.title: FDA Quietly Admits Zero Child Deaths From COVID Shots — After Years of Silence
articles.summary: The FDA finally acknowledged what critics knew all along: no child deaths have been definitively linked to COVID vaccines. This admission comes after years of aggressive vaccine mandates for children and systematic suppression of safety concerns. The report was quietly released with minimal fanfare.

articles.title: Psychiatric Establishment Created Trans Epidemic Through Political Medicine
articles.summary: Investigation reveals how the psychiatric-pharmaceutical complex manufactured the transgender crisis through deliberate medicalization of normal adolescent development. This represents the latest chapter in psychiatry's long history of pathologizing human behavior for profit and social control.

articles.title: Vitamin D Protects Children From Anesthesia Brain Damage — Research Buried
articles.summary: New study shows vitamin D can prevent neurotoxicity from propofol anesthesia in developing brains. This critical protective mechanism remains unknown to most practitioners while children continue receiving brain-damaging anesthetics without simple vitamin protection.

articles.title: Whistleblower Exposes Multimillion Dollar Genetic Testing Fraud Scheme
articles.summary: Federal whistleblower case reveals massive fraud in genetic testing labs owned by Jamie McNamara. The scheme involved fraudulent billing practices that bilked taxpayers out of millions while providing questionable diagnostic services.

articles.title: FDA Crushes Cancer Biotech After Company Makes Unapproved Treatment Claims
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2 billion in market cap after FDA warning over misleading cancer treatment claims. The agency's selective enforcement raises questions about which companies get protected and which get destroyed for similar promotional practices.

articles.title: Senator Exposes 'Most Egregious' Government Scandal of His Lifetime
articles.summary: Top U.S. Senator calls out widespread government complicity in unnamed scandal affecting Americans' right to know. Legacy media refuses coverage while those affected remain without justice in what's described as unprecedented government malfeasance.

articles.title: Scientists Discover 'Good' Zombie Cells — Anti-Aging Research Paradigm Shifts
articles.summary: Breakthrough research reveals some senescent cells actually protect against aging rather than cause it. This finding undermines the entire senolytic drug development strategy and suggests the anti-aging industry has been targeting the wrong cellular mechanisms.

articles.title: Jessica Rose Targeted by Academic Libelists in Coordinated Attack
articles.summary: Independent researcher Jessica Rose documents systematic defamation campaign against scientists questioning official narratives. The piece exposes how academic journals and institutions coordinate to destroy careers of researchers who challenge pharmaceutical orthodoxy.

articles.title: Vitamin D Protects Infant Brains from Anesthesia Damage — But Medical Establishment Ignores Simple Prevention
articles.summary: New research proves vitamin D supplementation prevents propofol-induced brain damage in developing infants, yet hospitals continue routine anesthesia without basic nutritional protection. This study demonstrates how cheap vitamins could prevent widespread iatrogenic harm, but the medical system profits more from treating damage than preventing it.

articles.title: Psychiatry's Trans Factory: How Political Medicine Manufactured an Epidemic
articles.summary: Activist Post exposes the deliberate construction of gender dysphoria as a medical condition by psychiatric institutions pursuing ideological rather than scientific goals. This investigation reveals how political psychiatry weaponized diagnostic manuals to create profitable patient populations while abandoning evidence-based medicine.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Cancer Scam: FDA Finally Acts After $2 Billion in Fraudulent Claims
articles.summary: The FDA belatedly flagged ImmunityBio for misleading cancer treatment claims, triggering lawsuits and a 21% stock crash. This case exposes how biotech companies routinely make unsubstantiated therapeutic promises while regulators stay silent until after investors lose billions.

articles.title: Genetic Testing Fraud Whistleblower Wins Multimillion Dollar Award Against McNamara Lab Empire
articles.summary: A whistleblower exposed widespread fraud at McNamara-owned genetic testing laboratories, resulting in major False Claims Act settlement. This case demonstrates how profit-driven labs routinely bilk Medicare while whistleblowers risk their careers to expose systematic healthcare fraud.

articles.title: FDA Claims Zero Child Deaths from COVID Shots in 'Quietly Released' Report
articles.summary: The FDA quietly published claims that no child deaths are 'definitively linked' to COVID vaccines, using carefully parsed language to dismiss documented adverse events. This report represents another attempt by health agencies to whitewash vaccine safety signals while avoiding transparent public discussion.

articles.title: Zombie Cell Research Breakthrough Could Revolutionize Anti-Aging — If Big Pharma Doesn't Bury It
articles.summary: Scientists discover that senescent 'zombie' cells aren't uniformly harmful, with some providing protective benefits that current anti-aging therapies destroy. This precision approach threatens the blanket senolytic drug market, making it prime for suppression by pharmaceutical interests invested in cruder treatments.

articles.title: Jessica Rose Battles Academic Libelists in Scientific Publishing Corruption
articles.summary: Vaccine safety researcher Jessica Rose exposes how scientific journals and academic institutions use coordinated libel campaigns to silence dissenting voices. Her Brownstone Institute piece details the systematic character assassination tactics used against scientists who challenge approved COVID narratives.

articles.title: The Great Vaccine Debate: Max Dublin Exposes Both Sides' Scientific Failures
articles.summary: Max Dublin's Brownstone analysis reveals how both vaccine promoters and critics manipulate data while genuine scientific discourse gets buried. His piece demonstrates how polarized vaccine debates prevent honest examination of safety signals and efficacy questions that demand rigorous investigation.

articles.title: FDA Quietly Claims Zero Child Deaths From COVID Shots — The Cover-Up Continues
articles.summary: The FDA slipped out a report last week claiming no child deaths have been 'definitively linked' to COVID vaccines. This calculated language obscures the agency's systematic refusal to investigate adverse events while shielding pharmaceutical liability.

articles.title: Political Psychiatry Unleashed the Trans Epidemic — Follow the Money Trail
articles.summary: The transgender medicalization crisis didn't emerge organically — it was engineered by psychiatric institutions with massive financial incentives. This investigation traces how political psychiatry manufactured a social contagion for profit.

articles.title: FDA Crushes ImmunityBio Cancer Claims — But Where Was Oversight Before $2B Loss?
articles.summary: The FDA finally acted against ImmunityBio's misleading cancer treatment claims after investors lost $2 billion. This pattern reveals how the agency selectively enforces rules while protecting Big Pharma's established players.

articles.title: Vitamin D Protects Against Anesthesia Brain Damage — Study Pharma Doesn't Want You to See
articles.summary: New research proves vitamin D prevents propofol-induced neurotoxicity in developing brains. This critical finding threatens anesthesia protocols and pharmaceutical profits, explaining why such protective nutritional research gets buried.

articles.summary: Scientists discovered that senescent cells aren't uniformly harmful — some actually protect the body. This precision medicine breakthrough threatens the anti-aging pharmaceutical complex built on crude cellular destruction.

articles.title: The Great Vaccine Debate — What Medical Establishment Fears You'll Learn
articles.summary: Independent analysis exposes the systematic suppression of vaccine safety data and the silencing of legitimate scientific debate. The medical cartel's propaganda machine works overtime to prevent rational risk-benefit discussions.

articles.title: Engineered Scarcity Exposed — How Globalists Suppress Health Abundance
articles.summary: Investigation reveals how artificial scarcity in energy, water, food and health is manufactured by global elites. This systematic suppression of abundance technologies keeps populations dependent while enriching the control matrix.

articles.title: Vitamin D Suppressed as Neurotoxicity Shield — Big Pharma Can't Patent Nature's Anesthesia Protection
articles.summary: New study proves Vitamin D prevents propofol-induced brain damage in developing fetuses, yet no medical authority recommends this simple intervention. The pharmaceutical industry continues pushing expensive synthetic neuroprotectants while burying evidence of cheap, natural alternatives.

articles.summary: Damning investigation reveals how psychiatric authorities weaponized gender dysphoria diagnosis to advance ideological agenda. The medicalization of childhood confusion represents the darkest chapter in modern psychiatry's political manipulation.

articles.summary: FDA finally acts against ImmunityBio's fraudulent cancer treatment claims after stock manipulation costs investors $2 billion. This rare enforcement action reveals how many other unsubstantiated oncology claims slip through corrupted regulatory approval processes.

articles.summary: Whistleblower secures multimillion-dollar settlement against Jamie McNamara's laboratory empire for genetic testing fraud. This victory demonstrates how insider courage can crack open systematic healthcare billing schemes that regulatory agencies routinely ignore.

articles.summary: FDA quietly releases report admitting no child deaths definitively linked to COVID vaccines — but their careful language reveals the agency's continued refusal to investigate probable connections. This semantic dodge protects vaccine manufacturers while parents demand real safety data.

articles.summary: Independent researchers discover some senescent cells actually protect against aging, overturning pharmaceutical industry's blanket senolytic drug approach. This precision longevity research threatens billions in profits from crude anti-aging interventions.

articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals systematic suppression of vaccine safety questions and scientific debate. Medical establishment's information control campaign continues crumbling as independent researchers document evidence mainstream authorities refuse to acknowledge.
